tools.name: list_energy_endpoints
tools.description: List the verified paid energy products with pricing, payment requirements and trust endpoints.

tools.name: get_signal_index
tools.description: Get the free negative-price signal index without exact probability, action, time window or expected value.

tools.name: get_payment_info
tools.description: Return x402 payment configuration for Base Mainnet USDC.

tools.name: pricing_lookup
tools.description: Return the machine-readable price list for all paid energy products.

tools.name: energy_research_quick
tools.description: [Research & Intelligence] Research and market-monitoring agents buy this endpoint to answer a focused question with a compact live market snapshot.

tools.name: get_current_german_spot_electricity_price
tools.description: [Live Energy Data] Trading and dispatch agents buy this endpoint to obtain the current German EPEX spot price for immediate decisions.

tools.name: get_price_forecast
tools.description: [Live Energy Data] Energy-trading and flexible-load agents buy this endpoint to compare the next 24 hours of EPEX prices and volatility.

tools.name: get_grid_load
tools.description: [Live Energy Data] Grid-monitoring and dispatch agents buy this endpoint to obtain the latest German system load from SMARD.

tools.name: get_renewable_share
tools.description: [Live Energy Data] Carbon-aware and ESG agents buy this endpoint to measure the current renewable share and generation mix in Germany.

tools.name: find_flexibility_window
tools.description: [Optimization Signals] EV, heat-pump, and flexible-load agents buy this endpoint to identify the cheapest upcoming operating hours.

tools.name: get_energy_trading_signal
tools.description: [Optimization Signals] Trading bots buy this endpoint to receive a multi-factor buy/sell signal with RSI, Z-score, trend, and confidence.

tools.name: call_bundle_trading
tools.description: [Optimization Signals] Energy-trading agents buy this endpoint to receive an eight-source market bundle with key metrics, insights, and raw evidence.

tools.name: find_cheapest_window
tools.description: [Optimization Signals] Flexible-load agents buy this endpoint to schedule a contiguous operating window at the lowest average electricity price.

tools.name: energy_decision
tools.description: [Optimization Signals] EV, battery, and flexible-load agents buy this endpoint to receive an executable action with timing, expected value, confidence, and expiry.

tools.name: negative_price_signal
tools.description: [Optimization Signals] Battery, EV, and trading agents buy this endpoint to receive calibrated 2h/4h/6h negative-price probabilities, reviewed threshold profiles and an executable response policy.
